queries.question: Display all essays and letters for authors born on June 23rd 1970.
queries.sql:
SELECT WrittenWorks.Title 
FROM TypesOfWork JOIN WrittenWorks ON TypesOfWork.Type = WrittenWorks.TypeOfWork JOIN Writes ON WrittenWorks.WorkID = Writes.WorkID JOIN Authors ON Writes.AuthorID = Authors.AuthorID
WHERE (TypesOfWork.Type = "Essay" OR TypesOfWork.Type = "Letter") AND Authors.BirthDate = "1970-06-23"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?typesofwork a :TypesOfWork .
  ?writtenworks a :WrittenWorks .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_l .
  ?writtenworks p:TypeOfWork ?typeofwork_r .
  ?writes a :Writes .
  ?writes p:hasWrittenWorks ?writtenworks .
  ?authors a :Author .
  ?writes p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?writtenworks p:Title ?title .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_w .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?authors p:BirthDate ?birthdate_w .
  FILTER(STR(?type_l) = STR(?typeofwork_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Essay" || STR(?type_w2) = "Letter")) && STR(?birthdate_w) = "1970-06-23"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display all essays and letters for authors born on June 23rd 1970.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?typesofwork a :TypesOfWork .
  ?writtenworks a :WrittenWorks .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_l .
  ?writtenworks p:TypeOfWork ?typeofwork_r .
  ?writes a :Writes .
  ?writes p:hasWrittenWorks ?writtenworks .
  ?authors a :Author .
  ?writes p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?writtenworks p:Title ?title .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_w .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?authors p:BirthDate ?birthdate_w .
  FILTER(STR(?type_l) = STR(?typeofwork_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Essay" || STR(?type_w2) = "Letter")) && STR(?birthdate_w) = "1970-06-23"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?typesofwork a :TypesOfWork .
  ?writtenworks a :WrittenWorks .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_l .
  ?writtenworks p:TypeOfWork ?typeofwork_r .
  ?writes a :Writes .
  ?writes p:hasWrittenWorks ?writtenworks .
  ?authors a :Author .
  ?writes p:hasAuthors ?authors .
  ?writtenworks p:Title ?title .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_w .
  ?typesofwork p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?authors p:BirthDate ?birthdate_w .
  FILTER(STR(?type_l) = STR(?typeofwork_r))
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Essay" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Letter" && STR(?birthdate_w) = "1970-06-23")))
} }
}
